title: yulania denudata subsp. pubescens
intro: Yulania denudata subsp. pubescens, also known as the pubescent or hairy Chinese magnolia, is a subspecies of the Yulania denudata tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Yulania denudata subsp. pubescens include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
